title: Axolotl Totem! (No longer updated)
description: Do you love Axolotls? Then this is for you!
body:
## What is this?
This texture pack replaces the regular totem with axolotls, if you change the totem from these names:

- Luntik_Axolotl: Pink axolotl
- Blue_Axolotl: Blue axolotl
- Yellow_Axolotl: Yellow axolotl
- GXXrd_Axolotl: Secret axolotl

Write with caps where necessary! Otherwise you won't succeed

## Screenshots

The name for the changes and the axolotls themselves:

![Axolotls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/959a2b9dbceaf62fcc60a6c6f06d00e2c8bb5154.png)
![Axolotli v rukah](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cae323de92f3127b96727e359e50ec63a3efb001.png)

## How to do this?
Everything is very simple

1. Take the anvil
2. Open the anvil interface
3. Place the totem in the appropriate slot
4. Rename the totem to one of the names that can be taken just above this description.
5. Ready! Now your favorite axolotl will always be with you!
